inputs.label: Life Expectancy at Birth (years)
inputs.businessContext: Total expected years of life from birth based on current mortality rates.

inputs.label: Prevalence of Severe Activity Limitation
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of population with severe long-standing activity limitation, expressed as a decimal (0-1).

inputs.label: Prevalence of Moderate Activity Limitation
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of population with moderate activity limitation, expressed as a decimal (0-1).

inputs.label: Disability Weight for Severe Limitation
inputs.businessContext: Health loss weight for severe state (0 = full health, 1 = worst possible health).

inputs.label: Disability Weight for Moderate Limitation
inputs.businessContext: Health loss weight for moderate state (0 = full health, 1 = worst possible health).
